as_paths.description: Details of AS paths for BGP routing, helpful for analyzing route propagation

creation_timestamp.description: Timestamp when the route was created, useful for auditing and tracking changes

id.description: Unique identifier for referencing the route in configurations

next_hop_hub.description: Specifies the next hop hub, useful for identifying traffic forwarding endpoints

next_hop_inter_region_cost.description: Cost of inter-region routing for the next hop, aids in cost management decisions

next_hop_med.description: Multi-Exit Discriminator value for the next hop, used in route selection

next_hop_network.description: Specifies the network for the next hop, essential for routing configuration

next_hop_origin.description: Indicates the origin of the next hop, useful for understanding route sources

next_hop_peering.description: Peering connection for the next hop, important for inter-network connectivity

route_status.description: Current operational status of the route, helps in monitoring route availability

route_type.description: Type of route, such as static or dynamic, useful for route classification

self_link.description: URL of the route resource, useful for API calls and resource referencing

warnings.description: List of warnings for the route, useful for identifying potential issues
